answer:
\boxed{C}

Grigori Perelman refused the Fields Medal in 2006 and 2010, citing a desire to avoid public attention and the pressure associated with the award. Andrew Wiles accepted the Abel Prize (not the Fields Medal) for his proof of Fermat’s Last Theorem, while Terence Tao and Edward Witten have both received prestigious mathematical honors, including the Fields Medal (Tao) and the Fields Medal (Witten was nominated but declined due to his work in physics).
